Real DNS, Fetch, streams, Cheerio, Playwright, axe-core, files, processes, packages, containers, assistive-technology review, load, legal review, restore, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Version JSON Lines records, encoding, ordering, missingness, provenance, error rows, and digest manifest for streaming consumers.

For Authorized site auditing and TypeScript Defend the Jsonl Contract model · Theory Jsonl Contract, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: One JSON object per line is self-documenting and interoperable.
